metadata.occupation: Former Lead Engineer, VerveTech Solutions; Current Owner, NovaTech Consultancy

content: I was terminated on October 28, 2023, after refusing to sign an NDA that would have given VerveTech ownership of a protocol I developed over three years. I have no access to their systems now. I moved to Mysore in November. I don’t know Arjun Mehta or Rohan Desai personally. I don’t use cryptocurrency. I don’t even know how to create a wallet. I’ve never been to Jayanagar. I don’t know anything about the forged approval form. I’ve never used a burner phone. I was at home in Mysore on the night of November 15, watching a movie with my sister. She can confirm. I’m being framed. I’ve been followed since my termination. I’ve received threatening emails from someone using my old email address. I reported it to the police in Mysore on November 12.
